title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 436.345 - Home inspection not required for sale of property, exception
text:
436.345.  Home inspection not required for sale of property, exception. — Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, no political subdivision shall require a property owner to have a home inspection conducted of a residential property prior to the sale of the property.  This provision shall not apply to any inspection requirement of new construction or occupancy permits.
(L. 2024 H.B. 2062 § 436.337)
